mapper.select: select p.P_NUMBER as pNumber, p.P_TITLE as pTitle, p.CONTENTS as contents, p.VIEWS as views, p.P_DATE as pDate, p.P_TYPE as pType, p.USER_ID as userId, u.USER_NAME as userName from post p join users u on p.USER_ID = u.USER_ID where p.P_TYPE = 'V'

SELECT P.P_NUMBER as pNumber, P.P_TITLE as pTitle, P.CONTENTS as contents, P.VIEWS as views, P.P_DATE as pDate, P.P_TYPE as pType, U.USER_NAME as userName, P.USER_ID as userId FROM POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.P_NUMBER = #{pNumber}
